== Notes for [[Item:Q103400|Q103400]] ==

[http://berdichevsky.tribalpages.com/family-tree/berdichevsky/1195/804/Benvenisti-HaLevi-Family '''Berdichevsky-Sokolka Families Tree, Benvenisti-HaLevi-Family''']

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000013130161225

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
